name: record_fleet_event
description: Persist a fleet or per-client lifecycle event (research/position/build/QA/deploy/publish/approve/retry/error, across both the site-build and content-loop pipelines) to the fleet_events Mongo collection. client_id is optional for fleet-scoped events (e.g. fleet_started) and required for client-scoped events. Fails clearly when Mongo is not configured. Optional cost_usd rolls up into the client's per-pipeline usage and the fleet total cost.

fleet_id.description: ID of the parent fleet run this event belongs to.

client_id.description: Client this event pertains to. Omit for fleet-level events not scoped to a single client.

pipeline.description: Which of the client's two pipelines this event belongs to. Omit only for fleet-level events.

payload.description: Free-form event detail, e.g. { build_id, draft_id, gate_result, retry_count, platform_status, error_message }.

cost_usd.description: Optional per-event cost in USD (LLM tokens + tool calls attributable to this event). Rolls up into that client's per-pipeline usage and then the fleet-wide total. Omit when the event has no directly attributable spend.
